workspace.heading: Project workspace
workspace.subheading: Configure the concrete workspace Paperclip attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.
workspace.primaryDesc: This is the project's primary codebase workspace.

fields.setupCommandHint: Runs when this workspace needs custom bootstrap
fields.cleanupCommandHint: Runs before project-level execution workspace teardown
fields.workspaceCommandsJsonHint: Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it. Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.

commands.heading: Workspace commands
commands.description: Long-running services stay supervised here, while one-shot jobs run on demand against this workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
commands.advancedJsonDesc: Paperclip derives Services and Jobs from this JSON. Prefer editing named commands first; use raw JSON for advanced lifecycle, port, readiness, or environment settings.
commands.noServicesStarted: No services have been started for this workspace yet.
commands.noRuntimeConfig: No workspace command config is defined for this workspace yet.
commands.noJobsConfigured: No one-shot jobs are configured for this workspace yet.
commands.disabledHint: Project workspaces need a working directory before local commands can run, and services also need runtime config.

sourceTypes.local_path_desc: A local path Paperclip can use directly.
sourceTypes.non_git_path_desc: A local folder without git semantics.
sourceTypes.git_repo_desc: A repo URL with optional refs and local checkout.
sourceTypes.remote_managed_desc: A hosted workspace tracked by external reference.

workspace.notFound: Workspace not found for this project.

errors.remoteRequiresRef: Remote-managed workspaces require a remote workspace ref or repo URL.
errors.requiresPathOrUrl: Workspace requires at least one local path or repo URL.
errors.pathMustBeAbsolute: Local workspace path must be absolute.
errors.invalidRepoUrl: Repo URL must be a valid URL.
errors.jsonMustBeObject: Workspace commands JSON must be a JSON object.
